channel.title: ShadowFetch News
channel.description: Late-breaking headlines across every beat — aggregated, organized, and brief-first.

item.title: Brady on comeback: NFL didn't 'like that idea'
item.description: Tom Brady says he explored the possibility of coming out of retirement and returning to the NFL, adding that the league did not "like that idea very much."
item.author: ESPN Headlines

item.title: LSU lures Wade back as it fires coach McMahon
item.description: Will Wade said in a statement posted to X on Thursday that he is leaving his job as the coach at NC State to return to LSU.
item.author: ESPN Headlines

item.title: Quad God rebounds from Olympics, leads worlds
item.description: Ilia Malinin bounced back from misfiring at the Milan Cortina Olympics by leading after the short program at the figure skating world championships.
item.author: ESPN Headlines

item.title: Amputee cornhole player waives right to hearing
item.description: A professional cornhole player who's also a quadruple amputee waived his right to an extradition hearing as authorities seek to move him from Virginia to Maryland, where he face...
item.author: ESPN Headlines

item.title: QB Simpson says he's 'absolutely' 1st-round pick
item.description: Ty Simpson felt like he made a final impression at Alabama's pro day in front of NFL scouts. He believes he's 'absolutely' a lock to be a first-round pick.
item.author: ESPN Headlines

item.title: Sens' Chabot (broken arm) could miss 2 months
item.description: Senators defenseman Thomas Chabot will miss up to two months with a broken arm, coach Travis Green announced on Thursday.
item.author: ESPN Headlines

item.title: World Series of Poker returning to ESPN in July
item.description: The World Series of Poker is returning to ESPN for the first time since 2021, with coverage of this year's main event from Las Vegas beginning July 2.
item.author: ESPN Headlines

item.title: Updated NBA rookie rankings: Why the ROY race is all but over
item.description: Where do the NBA's top rookies stack up with a few weeks left in the regular season? We stacked the top 10.
item.author: ESPN NBA

item.title: NBA Power Rankings: The Thunder reign while East teams rise
item.description: Where our NBA insiders ranked all 30 teams as the regular season reaches the home stretch.
item.author: ESPN NBA

item.title: Brewers star OF Chourio set to miss 2-4 weeks
item.description: The Brewers placed star outfielder Chourio on the 10-day injured list on Thursday because of a fractured left hand. The move was made retroactive to Wednesday.
item.author: ESPN MLB

item.title: Source: Mets add Pham on minors deal for depth
item.description: The Mets added to their depth on Opening Day, reaching a minor league deal with veteran outfielder Tommy Pham, a source told ESPN.
item.author: ESPN MLB

item.title: Fried's gem lifts Yanks despite Judge's 4-K opener
item.description: Max Fried allowed just two hits in 6⅓ scoreless innings, and the Yankees cruised past the Giants 7-0 on Wednesday night despite Aaron Judge's first career hitless Opening Day.
item.author: ESPN MLB

item.title: Padres' Darvish to restricted list amid elbow rehab
item.description: Pitcher Yu Darvish was placed on the restricted list Wednesday as he spends the 2026 season recovering from elbow surgery, a decision that could free up significant payroll spac...
item.author: ESPN MLB

item.title: Impact of overturned ABS calls worries ex-ump
item.description: Former MLB umpire Richie Garcia is worried about the impact that robot umpires will have on their human counterparts.
item.author: ESPN MLB

item.title: My brief, weird time with the Samsung TriFold
item.description: I was ready to give up on the Galaxy Z TriFold. We had a strong case for getting a refund from the eBay seller - they'd claimed it was the version sold in Taiwan, but the phone...
item.author: The Verge

item.title: US official accuses China of supporting, exploiting cyber scam crisis in Southeast Asia
item.description: A senior U.S. official accused China’s government of implicitly backing Chinese criminal syndicates running cyber scam compounds across Southeast Asia and of exploiting a crisis...
item.author: The Record

item.title: Elon Musk's X advertising boycott lawsuit dismissed by US judge
item.description: US District Judge Jane Boyle said the company had failed to show it had suffered any harm under federal competition laws.
item.author: BBC Technology

item.title: Iran live updates: Trump renews Iran threats, urges deal 'before it is too late'
item.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.
item.author: ABC News Top Stories

item.title: Police force reopens investigation into Andrew Tate abuse claims
item.description: It comes a day after the police watchdog said it would look into the force's handling of reports against the influencer.
item.author: BBC News

item.title: The Kennedy Center Is Giving Bill Maher the Mark Twain Prize
item.description: The annual award that recognizes merit in humor is going to the satirist and talk show host who has been critical of President Trump and political correctness.
item.author: New York Times Arts

item.title: Best Buy’s stock is rallying amid takeover speculation. But here’s the real story.
item.description: Some attributed the jump in Best Buy’s stock to the prospect of a takeover by GameStop, but the analyst who wrote the note that started that speculation says otherwise.
item.author: MarketWatch

item.title: HELOC rates are closing in on the 6% range. Here's what a $20,000 HELOC costs monthly now.
item.description: HELOC interest rates are closing in on the 6% range. So, how much will a $20,000 line of credit cost right now?
item.author: CBS News Latest

item.title: Blanche boasts of having ‘cleaned house’ at DOJ, FBI following Trump prosecutions
item.description: Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche boasted Thursday about the number of firings at the Department of Justice (DOJ) and FBI, saying the administration had “cleaned house” by ou...
item.author: The Hill

item.title: Average US long-term mortgage rate leaps to 6.38%, the highest level in more than 6 months
item.description: The average long-term U.S. mortgage rate climbed this week to its highest level in more than six months, driving up borrowing costs for prospective homebuyers during what’s supp...
item.author: ABC News Business

item.title: Witkoff says U.S. presented Iran with 15-point plan for potential peace proposal
item.description: President Trump warned Iran to make a deal on his terms "before it is too late."
item.author: CBS News Latest

item.title: Orban's Hungarian government accused of mass voter intimidation ahead of election
item.description: A film quoting voters, mayors and a police officer alleges money and drugs are being offered to pressure people to back the ruling party.
item.author: BBC World

item.title: 2 charged in connection with alleged explosive device at MacDill Air Force Base: FBI
item.description: An alleged improvised explosive device was found near the visitors center at MacDill Air Force Base in Florida last week.
item.author: ABC News Top Stories

item.title: What could cause mortgage rates to drop this April?
item.description: Mortgage rates have climbed back up in recent weeks, but several forces could pull them lower before April ends.
item.author: CBS News Latest

item.title: Federal Reserve urges judge to deny bid to revive Jerome Powell probe subpoenas
item.description: President Donald Trump, in his latest jibe at Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell, called him a "moron,' and blasted him over keeping interest rates too high.
item.author: CNBC Top

item.title: Major outgoing CEOs are citing AI as a factor in their decisions to step down
item.description: Coca-Cola CEO James Quincey and former Walmart CEO Doug McMillon have told CNBC that the next wave of artificial intelligence is a reason for their departures.
item.author: CNBC Top

item.title: Hillary Clinton to keynote New Hampshire Democrats fundraiser
item.description: Former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton (D) is set to speak at a major Democratic Party fundraiser in New Hampshire next month, the state party announced Thursday. Clinton is...
item.author: The Hill

item.title: Heat wave slams the Southwest
item.description: High temperatures are affecting the Southwest and breaking records. CBS News meteorologist Jessica Burch has the latest.
item.author: CBS News Latest

item.title: Brussels opens investigation into Snapchat amid concern over children’s safety
item.description: European Commission says social messaging app is exposing children to grooming and sexual exploitation Brussels has opened an investigation into Snapchat over concerns the socia...
item.author: Guardian Technology

item.title: Minnesota elections office subpoenaed in probe over state voter rolls, sources say
item.description: The Minnesota Secretary of State's Office has been ordered to turn over certain voter records.
item.author: CBS News Latest

item.title: Trump slams Starmer's reaction to Iran war and questions U.K. alliance
item.description: During a Cabinet meeting at the White House, President Trump reacted to British Prime Minister Keir Starmer's reluctance to get involved in the Iran war. This comes as Mr. Trump...
item.author: CBS News Latest

item.title: Hegseth says he welcomes deal with Iran, but Pentagon will keep ‘negotiating with bombs’
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said he would welcome a U.S.-led negotiated peace deal with Iran, after President Trump indicated earlier this week that Hegseth was “disappointed...
item.author: The Hill

item.title: Trump housing chief seeks new criminal probe into Letitia James
item.description: Bill Pulte, director of the Federal Housing Finance Agency, is seeking a new criminal probe into New York Attorney General Letitia James (D) after failing to convict her on mort...
item.author: The Hill

item.title: Arctic Winter Sea Ice Ties Record Low, NASA, NSIDC Scientists Find
item.description: For the second consecutive year, winter sea ice in the Arctic reached a level that matches the lowest peak observed since satellite monitoring began in 1979. On March 15, Arctic...
item.author: NASA News Releases

item.title: These 10 top-rated stocks are crushing the S&P 500 — yet the media and Wall Street ignore them
item.description: Stocks with little coverage tend to outperform well-known and widely followed peers.
item.author: MarketWatch

item.title: Top Senate Dems blast proposed ACA rule promoting ‘junk coverage’ that would push estimated 2 million off enrollment
item.description: A trio of top Senate Democrats led their colleagues in condemning a proposed rule by the Trump administration that would lift restrictions on the number of non-standardized plan...
item.author: The Hill
